coveo:metadata.description: Learn what staggered fitment means, how it affects performance and handling, where it makes sense, and the maintenance trade-offs — straight from tire experts.

coveo:metadata.title: How Fast and How Far Can You Drive On A Spare Tire?
coveo:metadata.description: Learn how fast and how far you can drive on a spare tire. Follow the 50/50 rule, avoid damage, and stay safe on the road.

coveo:metadata.description: Maximize your profits by keeping your fleet vehicle’s tires in ship shape! We’ll show you how at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts.

coveo:metadata.title: How to Drive in Snow
coveo:metadata.description: Learn how to drive in snow with expert tips for safety on icy roads. Discover traction strategies, skid recovery tips, and why winter tires are used for cold-weather driving.

coveo:metadata.description: Discover top-rated tires for wet roads and rainy weather. Our expert tips for safety and performance won’t leave you out in the rain!

coveo:metadata.description: From our classic commercials to educational videos about tires and wheels, we’ve got fun and informative videos about tires, wheels and safety!

coveo:metadata.description: Wondering if you can use snow tires year-round? Learn why winter tires are made for the cold, risks of summer use, and alternatives for safety and performance.

coveo:metadata.description: Stuck in the mud? America's Tire explains how to get a car stuck in mud out!

coveo:metadata.description: Got your car stuck in the snow? Don’t get caught out in the cold, let us teach you how to get your vehicle out of a snowbank!

coveo:metadata.description: Learn which drivetrain performs best in snow—AWD, 4WD, FWD, or RWD. Discover how winter tires impact traction and safety for your winter commute.

coveo:metadata.title: How To Air Down Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Learn how to air down tires to max out traction for off-roading. Discover recommended PSI for sand, mud, snow, and rock, plus expert tips to protect your tires.

coveo:metadata.title: What Is Treadwell? A Q&A with Dr. Baldwin on How Tire Recommendations Work
coveo:metadata.description: Treadwell is a smart tire shopping tool that helps drivers choose the best tires possible using objective test data, real customer mileage experience, and local weather tailored to the driver's zip code and driving priorities.

coveo:metadata.description: Researching the best tire for you is easier with purchase-verified customer tire reviews at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.description: Looking for the safest tires? From your family sedan to your minivan, we have the best tires at the lowest prices at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.description: Learn how America's Tire tests tires using real-world data, controlled testing, and predictive modeling to measure lifespan, safety, and performance.

coveo:metadata.description: Explore the best places to mount a spare tire and compare truck bed, hitch, roof, and hood options. Get fitment tips and expert help at America's Tire.
